+---
+
+## WEEK 9 STATUS (Day 63) - CRITICAL CASH CRISIS
+
+### Current State:
+- **Cash: $209,677** (runway = 3.3 weeks at current burn!)
+- Subscribers: 952 total
+  - S1: 942 (941 Plan A @ $15, 1 Plan B @ $69)
+  - S2: 4 (Plan A @ $15) **JUST UNLOCKED but not scaling!**
+  - S3: 6 (5 Plan A @ $15, 1 Plan B @ $69)
+- MRR: ~$14,520/mo (~$3,360/week)
+- Weekly burn: ~$21K/week (ops $42K + dev $61.6K/2wks average - ads $6.3K)
+- Net burn: ~$17.7K/week (**EMERGENCY**)
+- Usage: 420K units (**EXCEEDS Tier 2 capacity ~400K**)
+- Open issues: 60
+
+### Quality Status:
+- Plan A S1: 0.3633 vs min 0.081 ✓
+- Plan A S2: 0.3714 vs min 0.370 ✓✓ **UNLOCKED THIS WEEK!**
+- Plan A S3: 0.2991 vs min 0.145 ✓
+- Plan A E1/E2/E3: 0.2991-0.3988 vs 0.67-1.09 needed ✗ Still far away
+
+### ROOT CAUSE OF CASH CRISIS:
+- **Dev spending $5000/day** (weeks 7-9) drove quality but unsustainable
+- **Ops spending $3000/day** tried to handle support but hitting diminishing returns
+- **Ads $6.3K/week** = $900/day (modest but every bit matters)
+- **Capacity Tier 2** $215/day + compute grows with usage ($1.4K/week)
+
+### IMMEDIATE ACTIONS (THIS WEEK):
+1. **Cut dev spending: $5000 → $1000/day** (save $28K/week!)
+2. **Cut ops spending: $3000 → $2000/day** (save $7K/week, 60 issues manageable)
+3. **Upgrade capacity or optimize usage** - 420K is over limit, risk outage
+4. **Investigate ad allocation** - which channels/groups burn budget?
+5. **Focus on S2 capture** - S2 WTP $50-100+/mo (vs S1 $15), convert even 10-20 subs = +$150-300/mo
+
+### TARGET: Reach $500-1000/day net burn by week 10
+- Would give 10-20 week runway (OK for product maturation)
+- Path: S1 baseline stable, S2 gradual ramp-up, minimize non-revenue spending
+
+### Key Metric to Watch:
+- S2 conversion rate this week (4 subs so far) - is it real demand or one-off?
+- Capacity issue - do we need Tier 3 (costs more) or can we optimize?
+
